nodes.label: Phase I BRD Feature Coverage Audit
nodes.norm_label: phase i brd feature coverage audit

nodes.label: Approach A — Modular Monolith on Serverless Containers
nodes.rationale: Recommended verdict: a modular monolith on Fargate/App Runner is the smallest enterprise-safe architecture that autoscales and stays in India, giving a 4-10 person team the fastest path to shipping all 29 Phase I modules with lowest ops burden and trivial local dev. Trade-off (small always-on cost floor vs scale-to-zero) is negligible. Boundaries: TypeScript end-to-end, Aurora Serverless v2 PostgreSQL with RLS pooled in-process, S3 Object Lock WORM, Lambda used only for selective async/batch. Revises ADR-002/ADR-010 (away from pure FaaS); ADR-001/003/005/006/009/012/013 unchanged.
nodes.norm_label: approach a — modular monolith on serverless containers

nodes.label: Data-Driven Workflow Engine (product feature, not infra orchestration)
nodes.rationale: The BRD wants company admins to configure approval chains, conditional routing, SLAs and escalations at runtime. AWS Step Functions orchestrates infrastructure, not user-defined runtime workflows, so a data-driven workflow engine (definitions stored in Postgres, interpreted by the app, with durable timer/queue for SLA + escalation) is required. ~15 modules depend on it — a first-class build, not a library call.
nodes.norm_label: data-driven workflow engine (product feature, not infra orchestration)

nodes.label: Reporting on Read Replica / Analytics Store
nodes.rationale: Consolidated/ad-hoc reporting at sub-2s will strain the OLTP DB and belongs on a read replica (or small analytics store), not the primary write path. Applies regardless of compute choice and should be designed early.
nodes.norm_label: reporting on read replica / analytics store

nodes.label: Tenant Isolation Invariant (PostgreSQL RLS)
nodes.rationale: Team-size-independent bulletproof core: tenant isolation = PostgreSQL RLS (SET LOCAL company_id per transaction) + app-layer filter + isolation tests on every build; identity invariant User != Employee != Contractor; append-only hash-chained audit from day one; India residency (ap-south-1 + ap-south-2 DR).
